curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff. The readFile method in remote-fs-bridge.ts performed path resolution (resolveCanonicalPath), a hardlink check (assertNoHardlinkedFile), and then a separate shell cat command to read the file — a classic TOCTOU pattern. The fix replaces this with an atomic pinned-directory read via the mutation helper that opens the parent directory fd first and reads the file relative to it, eliminating the race window. The local fs-bridge.ts already used a pinned read approach so no sibling vulnerability exists. Pre-assigned class race-condition (CWE-367) is correct.
